director.tagline_zh: 遊戲廣告 × 商業影像導演
director.bio_zh: 鄭又勛（York）是台灣的遊戲廣告與商業影像導演。9 年來執導超過 88 個案子、產出逾 1000 支影音交付物，客戶橫跨 Schick舒適牌、王品集團、GODIVA、Google Play、茶裏王等消費品牌，以及斗羅大陸、天龍八部2、新仙俠：起源、失落的方舟等國際知名遊戲 IP。作品類型橫跨真人實拍、CG特效到AI生成影像等多元技術路線，從創意腳本、拍攝執行到後期製作皆一手包辦。
director.bio_en: York Cheng is a Taiwan-based director specializing in game advertising and commercial film. Over 9 years, he has directed 88+ projects and delivered 1,000+ final video assets for clients spanning consumer brands — Schick, Wang Steak Group, GODIVA, Google Play, and Tea's Tea — alongside internationally recognized game IPs including Soul Land, Tian Long Ba Bu 2, Xin Xianxia: Qiyuan, and Lost Ark. His work spans live-action production, CG effects, and AI-generated imagery, with hands-on involvement from creative scripting and production through post.

works.title_zh: 舒適牌 Schick HydroPRO 磁浮刮鬍刀 OTV
works.desc_zh: 為國際刮鬍刀品牌 Schick 執導的電視廣告，完整走過腳本、PPM、定裝到拍攝的商業製作流程。
works.desc_en: A commercial TVC for international razor brand Schick, taken through the full production pipeline from script and PPM to costume fitting and shoot.
works.concept_zh: 磁浮科技看不見，這支片的本事就是把它拍成看得見的東西——而主角自始至終是那把刮鬍刀。刀身在純黑舞台上自己懸浮、旋轉，先讓你把產品看清楚；真正的關鍵在刀貼上臉頰刮下去的瞬間，周圍亮起一圈藍光，鏡頭再推進到皮膚微距，刀鋒劃過的地方拖出一道藍色光跡——「磁浮」就這樣從規格表上的名詞，變成你眼睛裡真的看到的事。畫面裡的人只是配角：水絲沖過刀刃、91% 的字卡、他側光下那抹滿意的半笑，全都是在襯這把刀，不跟它搶戲。
works.concept_en: Magnetic levitation is invisible — this film's whole trick is making it visible, and the star throughout is the razor itself. The blade hovers and turns on its own on a pure black stage so you get a clean look at the product first; the real payoff is the instant the blade meets the cheek and a ring of blue light ignites around it, before the camera pushes into a skin-level macro where the blade drags a glowing blue trail. That's how "magnetic levitation" stops being a spec-sheet phrase and becomes something you actually watch happen. The people in frame are supporting cast — water threading over the blades, the "91%" caption, his satisfied half-smile under side light — all of it there to frame the razor, never to upstage it.

works.desc_zh: 為知名飲料品牌茶裏王執導《客棧圍攻篇》，官方頻道累積近 200 萬觀看。
works.desc_en: Directed "Inn Siege," a spot for popular tea brand Tea's Tea that has drawn nearly 2 million views on its official channel.
works.concept_zh: 整支片花足力氣裝成一場武俠打鬥，就為了在最後一秒拆穿它——把「一群人夠不夠喝」這種再日常不過的小事，藏進類型片的緊張裡。茶客棧裡，光頭反派撂下「你今天插翅也難飛」，一聲「都進來」，一群拿刀的人從四面把桌邊白衣主角圍住，鏡頭和構圖全在告訴你：要開打了。主角只是看了一圈說「人這麼多」，再問一句「夠嗎」。這句「夠嗎」是整個陷阱的樞紐：你以為他在問打不打得過，反派卻放下殺氣，舉起一大瓶茶灌了一口——「有大瓶的當然夠。」原來這群人不是來打架，是來喝茶的。用喝茶這個動作、而不是一行字卡去完成翻轉，才是這支片真正高明的地方。收在「歡聚一起乾 大瓶超回甘」和兩瓶 1250ml 上。
works.concept_en: The whole spot works hard to pass as a wuxia fight, purely so it can pull the rug out in the final second — hiding a completely ordinary selling point (is there enough tea to go around) inside genre tension. In a teahouse, a bald villain drops the line "there's no escaping today," barks "everyone, get in," and a crowd of armed men close in on the white-robed hero at his table; every angle tells you a brawl is coming. The hero just looks around, says "that's a lot of people," and asks, "is that enough?" That question is the hinge of the whole trap: you assume he's asking whether he can take them all — but the villain lets the menace drop, lifts a big bottle of tea and takes a swig: "with the big bottle, of course it's enough." The crowd never came to fight; they came to drink. The real craft here is that the twist is delivered by the act of drinking, not by a caption. It lands on "gather and drink up, the big bottle keeps its aftertaste," over the two 1250ml bottles.

works.title_zh: Google Play 台灣廣告《就差一點》
works.desc_zh: 為 Google Play 台灣執導的品牌廣告《就差一點》，官方頻道累積超過 42 萬觀看。
works.desc_en: Directed the Google Play Taiwan brand campaign "So Close," which has drawn over 420K views on the official YouTube channel.
works.concept_zh: 這支片的亮點，是用一種每個玩家都懂的心情——「就差一點」——把好幾款完全不同的手遊串成同一條線：要賣的通用點數不綁定任何一款遊戲、抓不到一個具體畫面，這個難題就被一種情緒解掉了。這份焦慮用三種鏡頭輪流講：貼著螢幕的第一人稱手指、一群人圍在手機旁的真實表情、還有完全跳出手機、直接放遊戲自己過場特效的畫面，各有各的力道。兩張素人的臉也不是最後才登場，而是慢慢長出來的——先混在圍觀人群裡當一般玩家，中段換上電競打扮，最後才站到霓虹招牌下對鏡頭喊話。這個從路人一路升格成主角的過程，本身就是在演「這組點數，把每一款遊戲裡的你都接了起來」。
works.concept_en: This film's hook is one feeling every gamer knows — "so close" — used to string several completely different mobile games onto a single thread. That's how it cracks the brief's real problem: points that work across every game aren't tied to any one of them, so there's no single image to hang them on. That anxiety is told through three kinds of shots taken in turns: a first-person thumb pressed to the screen, a crowd of real faces huddled around a phone, and moments that leave the phone behind entirely to play the game's own cutscene effects — each with its own punch. The two everyday faces aren't saved for the end either; they grow into the film — blending into the watching crowd as regular players, switching to an esports look mid-way, and only then stepping under the neon sign to talk straight to camera. That climb from bystander to host is itself the pitch: these points connect every version of you, across every game.

works.views_note_en: Director's cut from the channel archive
works.desc_zh: 為國際巧克力品牌 GODIVA 執導的品牌影片。
works.desc_en: A brand film directed for international chocolate label GODIVA.
works.concept_zh: 這支的看點，是把一盒巧克力放大到整座城市的尺度——沒有代言人、沒有一句旁白，全靠一件奇觀抓住你。一串 GODIVA 巧克力被串成一件巨大的聖誕吊飾，直接懸在地標塔樓的正上方；開場那道劃過夜空的金色流光，只是為了替它揭幕。奇觀先抓住眼睛，接著才交代身世：低多邊形的金色馴鹿、比利時老城的金線剪影，把「Belgium 1926」的血統講清楚；最後落回寫實的產品攝影，告訴你哪些是你真的能帶回家的。這條「先給你一個大到不可能的畫面、再一路收回到櫃上商品」的路徑，讓精品巧克力不只是好吃，而是一件值得抬頭仰望的事。全片沒有一張人臉，唯一的主角，就是品牌自己的馬車標誌。
works.concept_en: This one's hook is scaling a box of chocolate up to the size of a whole city — no spokesperson, no voiceover, just one piece of spectacle to hold you. A string of GODIVA chocolates is built into a giant Christmas ornament hung directly above a landmark tower, and the streak of gold light crossing the night sky at the open is only there to unveil it. Spectacle grabs the eye first, then the film earns its pedigree: low-poly gold reindeer and a gilded outline of old Belgian rowhouses spell out the "Belgium 1926" lineage, before it settles back onto straight product photography that tells you which parts you can actually take home. That path — hand you an impossibly big image first, then walk it all the way back to the box on the shelf — makes premium chocolate feel less like something merely tasty and more like something worth looking up at. Not one human face appears; the only lead is the brand's own horse-and-carriage crest.

works.views_note: 頻道 Shorts 三部曲(壹/貳/參之型)
works.views_note_en: A three-part Shorts series on the director's channel
works.desc_zh: 為王品集團新餐飲品牌「肉次方」執導的品牌廣告。
works.desc_en: A brand commercial directed for Wang Steak Group's new dining concept, Rou Ci Fang.
works.concept_zh: 這支把「肉夠不夠嫩」這件小事，講成一門要修煉的武功——整支片是一齣 AI 生成的武俠功夫喜劇。開場先把一整塊油花牛肉供在紅光武館長廊的正中央，像一件要被朝拜的聖物，然後才真的開打：師徒過招、全身纏著雷電，每一段都用紅霧字卡報出招式名，像「壹之型・口感の奧義・肉紋逆切」。刀刃劃開油花的超微距鏡頭一遍遍插進來，像一首歌的副歌，打斷每一段武打——把最抽象的「軟嫩」，錨回到一個你嚥得下口水的具體畫面。兩人打到一半突然四目相對，滿畫面愛心飄出來，又把武俠的殺氣和吃到飽的輕鬆揉進同一個鏡頭。用一整套武功心法的架子，去裝一間吃到飽燒肉店的賣點，誇張、自嘲，但每個梗都指回「肉」。
works.concept_en: This one turns something as small as "is the meat tender enough" into a martial art you have to train for — the whole spot is an AI-generated wuxia kung-fu comedy. It opens by enshrining a whole marbled cut of beef at the center of a red-lit dojo corridor, like a relic to be worshipped, and only then does the fighting start: master and disciple trading blows, lightning wrapped around them, each round announced on a red-mist card with a move name like "Form One: the Profound Meaning of Texture, the Grain Cuts Back." A hyper-close macro of a blade opening the marbling keeps cutting back in like a song's chorus, breaking up every fight — anchoring the abstract idea of "tenderness" to one concrete, mouth-watering shot. Halfway through a fight the two suddenly lock eyes and hearts flood the frame, folding wuxia's menace and a buffet's easy mood into the same shot. It borrows the entire scaffold of a martial-arts discipline to carry a buffet restaurant's pitch — broad and self-aware, but every gag points back to the meat.

works.views_note: 原配對誤植為競品版本（林志穎、坤達、鳳小岳三人合演的官方TVC，108萬觀看，非本案）。已依鄭又勛導演作品頻道 cX7d8eiJfz8 說明欄核實：導演鄭又勛／代言人林志穎（僅一人）；查無對應的官方高觀看版本，故觀看數不顯示，available on request
works.views_note_en: The original pairing mislabeled a competing version (an official TVC co-starring Jimmy Lin, Kunda, and Rhydian Vaughan, 1.08M views — not this case). Verified via York Cheng's director channel description for cX7d8eiJfz8: director York Cheng, single endorser Jimmy Lin only; no matching high-view official version was found, so the view count is not shown — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為經典武俠 IP《天龍八部2》執導廣告，由林志穎代言（依導演頻道說明欄核實，非坊間流傳的三人版）。
works.desc_en: Directed the commercial for classic wuxia IP Tian Long Ba Bu 2, featuring endorser Jimmy Lin (verified via the director's own channel description; not the widely-circulated three-endorser cut).
works.concept_zh: 這支不靠打鬥或特效開場，而是一上來就用三個排比句，把「執念」拆成三種代價，直接丟給觀眾：當上萬人之上，你卻要一個人走；打下整個天下，你卻要放手所愛；結拜了兄弟，又躲不過江湖的凶險。段譽（林志穎飾）走過的每一片雪原、每一叢金黃蘆葦，都是這幾句問話落成的實景。三問問完，他在風雪裡把三杯血酒一口飲盡，敬死去的兄弟。這支賣的是「金庸正版授權」，但它沒有靠特效去堆江湖，而是用一組問句逼你入戲——最後答案不落在權力或愛情上，落在最樸素的一句字卡：「也永遠兄弟齊心」。
works.concept_en: This one doesn't open on a fight or an effect — it opens by splitting "obsession" into three costs with three parallel lines, thrown straight at the viewer: rise above ten thousand others, and you walk alone; conquer the whole world, and you let the one you love go; swear brotherhood, and you still can't dodge the dangers of the jianghu. Every snowfield and bed of golden reeds Duan Yu (played by Jimmy Lin) crosses is one of those lines made into a real place. After the three questions, he drinks three cups of wine down in the blizzard for his fallen brothers. The film is selling an "officially licensed Jin Yong" title, but it doesn't pile on effects to conjure the jianghu — it uses a set of questions to pull you in, and the answer lands not on power or love but on the plainest caption of all: "we are still a unity."

works.title_en: Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters
works.client_en: Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters
works.views_note: 原配對為官方頻道無代言人的通用 PV（l6HfuzRfLO0，36.6萬觀看），與導演頻道實際案件（高燃集結篇/斗羅時空篇，代言人：汪東城、辰亦儒、曾沛慈、張皓明）不符。已改用官方頻道同代言人陣容版本（終極一班跨時空集結篇，20.8萬觀看），與導演頻道說明欄代言人確認一致
works.views_note_en: The original match was a generic official-channel PV with no endorsers (l6HfuzRfLO0, 366K views), which didn't match the director channel's actual case (endorsers Jiro Wang, Calvin Chen, Pets Tseng, and Chang Hao-Ming). Replaced with the official-channel version featuring the same endorser lineup (208K views), consistent with the endorsers confirmed in the director channel's description
works.desc_zh: 為知名 IP《斗羅大陸：獵魂世界》執導代言廣告，找回終極一班班底汪東城、辰亦儒、曾沛慈、張皓明重返校園場景，以「宗門集結」的召喚敘事貫穿全片。
works.desc_en: Directed the endorsement campaign for the major game IP Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters, reuniting KO ONE cast members Jiro Wang, Calvin Chen, Pets Tseng, and Chang Hao-Ming in their old school setting, built around a "Sect Assembly" call-to-arms.
works.concept_zh: 這支最聰明的一步，是把代言人這組人「本來就是兄弟」這件事，直接當成賣點來用——而且開場不留一秒敘舊。魂獸從背後撲上來的那一刻，熟悉的校園走廊就已經是戰場了。四位演員各自被一種顏色的特效纏上身：紫色雷電、金色光環、戰錘、火焰羽翼，校園實景和 CG 武魂被剪進同一顆鏡頭裡一起爆開。一句「這就是終極斗羅」，把遊戲裡的等級稱號，直接接到他們一起演了很多年的「終極一班」身分上——遊戲的「宗門集結」不用鋪陳，因為這群人本來就是一班的。收尾是四個人並肩走向鏡頭。
works.concept_en: The smartest move here is taking a fact — that this cast are already brothers — and using it directly as the pitch, with not one second of reunion small talk. The instant a soul beast lunges from behind, the familiar school corridor is already a battlefield. Each of the four actors is wrapped in a different color of effect: purple lightning, a gold ring, a war hammer, flaming wings — real hallway and CG martial soul cut into the same shot and going off together. One line, "this is the Ultimate Dou Luo," hooks the game's rank title straight onto the KO One (終極一班) identity these four have played together for years — the game's "assemble the sect" needs no setup, because this crowd was always one class. It closes on all four walking toward camera side by side.

works.views_note: 越南代理商官方頻道查無公開版本，僅導演個人頻道存檔（個位數觀看），available on request
works.views_note_en: No public version found on the Vietnamese publisher's official channel; only archived on the director's personal channel (single-digit views) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《開天》執導廣告，由林志穎代言，以雲海仙山的意象扣回「開天」的世界觀命題。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Kaitian (Heaven's Gate), featuring endorser Jimmy Lin, framed around a sea-of-clouds mountaintop vision that echoes the game's own origin-myth premise.
works.concept_zh: 這支最漂亮的收尾，是讓片名「開天」從一個遊戲名字，變成全片最後一個動作。一句「若世上萬火盡滅」牽出三段記憶：床帳裡守著熟睡孩子的一隻手、竹林陽光下第一次對上的眼神、三個人並肩扛住一道天雷的瞬間——童年、初戀、結義，被剪成同一種想念。林志穎在片裡不是演一個具體角色，而更像一個說故事的人，把這三段情緒疊到最高，直到旁白說出全片真正的重點：「我以此劍，開闢天地。」到這一句，「開天」不再只是招牌上的兩個字，它是他手起劍落的那個動作。用一段私人的記憶史去撐起一句氣魄很大的世界觀口號，是這支片高出一般玄幻預告的地方。
works.concept_en: The finest touch here is turning the title "Opening Heaven" from a game's name into the film's final action. A single line — "what if every fire in the world went out" — pulls up three memories: a hand watching over a sleeping child behind bed curtains, a first meeting of eyes in the sunlight of a bamboo grove, three figures bracing side by side under a bolt of lightning; childhood, first love, and brotherhood, all cut into the same kind of longing. Jimmy Lin isn't playing a specific character here so much as narrating — stacking those three beats to their peak until the voiceover says what the film is really about: "with this sword, I carve open heaven and earth." At that line, "Opening Heaven" stops being two words on a logo and becomes the stroke of his blade. Building a sweeping worldview tagline on top of one private history of memories is what lifts this above an ordinary fantasy trailer.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（說明欄核實代言人：徐若瑄），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (endorser confirmed via video description: Vivian Hsu) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《神魔傳說》執導廣告，由徐若瑄代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Shen Mo Chuan Shuo, featuring endorser Vivian Hsu.
works.concept_zh: 這支把代言做成了一件別人做不到的事：徐若瑄（Vivian Hsu）不是掛在片尾的一張名牌，而是整條角色線走到的終點。全片是一齣完整的 CG 悲劇——一個活了千年的黑袍女子，從戰場上倖存，到獨自站在屍堆裡快哭出來，再到綠色靈氣纏上全身、妝容變得妖冶。「那就和我一起成魔」是全片唯一的轉折，也是她從人變成神魔的那一刻。片尾那張具名徐若瑄的肖像，就是這個黑化終點本身——你記住的不是「某某明星代言了這款遊戲」，而是「這個成魔的女人，就是她」。把代言人變成故事的主角，比讓她站在 Logo 旁比讚有力得多。
works.concept_en: This spot pulls off something most endorsements can't: Vivian Hsu isn't a name tag stuck on the last frame — she's where an entire character arc ends up. The whole film is one complete CG tragedy: a woman who has lived a thousand years goes from surviving a battle, to standing alone in a field of the dead on the edge of tears, to green spectral energy wrapping her body as her look turns ornate and menacing. "Then let it transform me into a demon" is the film's one turn, and the moment she stops being human. The portrait credited to Vivian Hsu at the end is that turn itself — what you remember isn't "a star endorsed this game," it's "that woman who became a demon is her." Making the spokesperson the protagonist of the story is far stronger than posing her beside a logo.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（說明欄核實代言人：林心如），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (endorser confirmed via video description: Ruby Lin) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《超爆三國志》執導廣告，由林心如代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Chao Bao San Guo Zhi, featuring endorser Ruby Lin.
works.concept_zh: 這支不只是讓明星空降古戰場，而是用「今生／前世」雙重身分，讓林心如（Ruby Lin）同時是螢幕外的代言人、也是螢幕裡被喚醒的那個角色。她先以本人的樣子出現——黑色亮片、長髮迎風——下一個鏡頭就已經站在建安十三年的赤壁戰火裡。一隻披甲的手碰上額頭，像在喚醒一段被忘掉的前世。所以片中那句「沉寂千年的火鳳」不是一句形容詞，是她身分被揭開的那一刻。這個設計把「找明星代言」升級成「明星就是遊戲裡那個要被你喚醒的英魂」，代言人和遊戲世界觀因此扣在一起，不是各說各話。
works.concept_en: This one doesn't just parachute a star onto an ancient battlefield — it uses a present-life / past-life dual identity so that Ruby Lin is at once the endorser outside the screen and the character being woken up inside it. She first shows up as herself — black sequins, hair streaming in the wind — and the very next shot drops her into the fires of Red Cliffs in the thirteenth year of Jian'an. An armored hand touches a forehead, as if waking a past life that had been forgotten. So the line "the fire phoenix that has slept a thousand years" isn't a description — it's the moment her identity is revealed. The design upgrades "hire a celebrity" into "the celebrity is the ancient heroine you're here to awaken," locking the endorser and the game's world together instead of running them on separate tracks.

works.views_note: 官方頻道「征服之路-EOC」版本觀看數（代言人吳宗憲，說明欄核實）
works.views_note_en: View count from the official channel "征服之路-EOC" (endorser Jacky Wu, confirmed via video description)
works.desc_zh: 為策略手遊《文明與征服》（官方英文名 Era of Conquest）執導廣告，由吳宗憲代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the strategy mobile game Era of Conquest (文明與征服), featuring endorser Jacky Wu.
works.concept_zh: 這支不借代言人的光環，借的是他插科打諢的本能——把「文明衝突／全球大戰」這種很大的賣點，直接演成一場靠吳宗憲節奏撐起來的多方尬戲。一句「我當盟主 有誰不服」撂下去，先是一個角鬥士打扮的壯漢衝上來，接著羅馬皇帝連喊三聲「我不服」，才輪到他拔劍。畫面直接疊上一句英文「SHUT UP」，把一場多方互嗆的鬧劇壓成幾秒鐘的喜劇節奏。連遊戲名字都是他自己唸出來的，像連台詞都懶得裝成是別人寫的。這支證明了：對的代言人、用對他的本事，比砸再多特效去講「全球對戰」都更讓人記得住。
works.concept_en: This one doesn't borrow the star's aura — it borrows his instinct for a gag, staging a huge selling point ("clash of civilizations / global war") as a multi-way shouting match carried entirely by Wu Tsung-hsien's comic timing. He throws down "I'm the alliance leader, who refuses to submit," and first a muscular gladiator charges in, then a Roman emperor shouts "I don't submit" three times, before he even draws his sword. The screen slaps up an English "SHUT UP," squeezing a multi-way row into a few seconds of comic timing. He even says the game's name himself — as if the line couldn't be bothered to sound like someone else wrote it. It proves the point: the right spokesperson, used for what he's actually good at, is more memorable than any amount of effects spent explaining "global war."

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（金庸正版授權手遊，說明欄核實代言人：徐錦江），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (an officially Louis Cha-licensed mobile game; endorser confirmed via video description: Elvis Tsui) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為金庸正版授權手遊《新鹿鼎記》執導電視廣告，由徐錦江代言。
works.desc_en: Directed a TVC for the officially Louis Cha-licensed mobile game Xin Lu Ding Ji, featuring endorser Elvis Tsui.
works.concept_zh: 這支的聰明在於：它沒有把徐錦江的招牌反派翻過來玩，而是順著它加碼。鰲拜還是那個跋扈的鰲拜，只是他貪的東西從權力換成了美人和角色。建寧公主一句「用你最厲害的那招」點著他，雙胞胎姊妹接著說「兩個也不夠」，把他的胃口一路推到「我全部都要」——這條「越要越多」的台詞鏈，其實就是手遊集卡抽角色的玩法本身。尾卡老老實實打上「鰲拜」兩個字，提醒你這張臉從來不用假裝成別人。用一個觀眾早就認得的反派，去演「收集」這件事，賣點不用解釋，看臉就懂。
works.concept_en: The cleverness here is that it doesn't flip Xu Jinjiang's signature villain — it doubles down on him. Oboi is still the same domineering Oboi, he's just been redirected: from political power to beauties and collectible characters. Princess Jianning lights him up with "use your most powerful move," the twin sisters follow with "two isn't enough," pushing his appetite all the way to "I want them ALL" — and that escalating "I want more" chain is literally the gacha collect-the-characters loop. The end card names him plainly — Oboi — reminding you this face never has to pretend to be anyone else. Using a villain the audience already knows to act out "collecting" means the pitch needs no explaining: you get it from his face.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版_完整版（說明欄核實代言人：Selina任家萱、任容萱姊妹），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel, full cut (endorsers confirmed via video description: sisters Selina Jen and Lorene Jen) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《新仙俠：起源》執導廣告，由 Selina 任家萱與任容萱姊妹代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Xin Xianxia: Qiyuan, featuring sisters Selina Jen and Lorene Jen.
works.concept_zh: 這支的底氣，是找來一對真正的雙生姊妹（任家萱 Selina／任容萱），把她們現實裡的感情，直接變成戲的核心。片子把兩條時間線縫進同一首歌：現代的臥房裡，兩個孩子同床蓋被、互相安慰；古裝的世界裡，她們的化身在燭光前梳頭、在洞穴裡鄭重交換信物。兩邊反覆疊在一起，疊到你分不清誰是誰的前世。長大以後的兩姊妹，一個還穿著古裝、一個已經是現代打扮，並肩站著相視而笑——這份感情本來就跨著兩個時空，不需要翻成同一種樣子。找對了人，「羈絆跨越古今」這句話就不用演，它本身就是真的。
works.concept_en: The film's real strength is casting a genuine pair of twin sisters — Selina (任家萱) and 任容萱 — and making their real-life bond the core of the story. It stitches two timelines into one song: in a present-day bedroom, two children share a bed under a blanket, comforting each other; in the period world, their counterparts brush their hair by candlelight and solemnly trade a keepsake in a cave. The two keep layering over each other until you can't tell whose past life is whose. Grown up, the two sisters stand side by side — one still in ancient robes, one in modern dress — smiling at each other. This bond was always built across two timelines; it never needed to be translated into one look. With the right casting, "a bond that crosses time" doesn't have to be acted — it's simply true.

works.views_note: 官方遊戲頻道「斬妖」版本觀看數（代言人陳漢典，說明欄核實）
works.views_note_en: View count from the official game channel "斬妖" (endorser Hank Chen, confirmed via video description)
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《斬妖》執導事前預約廣告，由陳漢典代言。
works.desc_en: Directed a pre-registration campaign ad for the mobile game Zhan Yao, featuring endorser Hank Chen.
works.concept_zh: 這支的笑點，是一個比表面更狠的諧音哏：陳漢典（Hank Chen）演的「空虛公子」，拿著一把寫著「空虛」的扇子自封天下第一，下一秒就被身旁婢女當眾拆穿——「你不是空虛，是腎虛。」整支片的笑就架在這一個尷尬的諧音上，不是靠角色多浮誇。真正的看點是這個哏的延伸力：它被養成了一整首歌〈第一虛〉——彩色的荒誕喜劇（輪椅、壽宴配喪禮、打不通的電話）和顆粒感的黑白復古片段交錯剪，副歌一遍遍唱著「腎虛空虛」；直到片尾才揭曉真正的聯動——「斬妖×西遊」。一個諧音哏，長出一支廣告、一首主題曲、一次 IP 聯動——這才是這個案子的規模。
works.concept_en: The joke here is a nastier pun than it looks: Hank Chen plays "Young Master Void," fanning himself with a placard that reads "Void" and declaring himself number one under heaven — only to get publicly deflated a beat later by a maidservant: "You're not Void, you're Kidney-Deficient." The whole film rests on that one awkward homophone, not on how over-the-top the character is. The real hook is how far that one gag stretches: it's grown into a full theme song, "The First Void" — color-graded absurd comedy (a wheelchair, a birthday party crossed with a funeral, a call no one picks up) intercut with grainy black-and-white retro segments, the chorus looping "kidney-void, empty-void" — before the ending finally reveals a real crossover: Zhanyao × Journey to the West. One pun, grown into an ad, a theme song, and an IP tie-in — that's the true scale of this campaign.

works.views_display_zh: 官方頻道系列合計 9.9萬+觀看
works.views_note: 官方頻道 4 支（宣傳MV+多慧小劇場×2+賺翻篇）合計 99,793 觀看；此為導演版存檔
works.views_note_en: Four cuts on the game's official channel total 99,793 views; this player shows the director's archived cut
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《玩賺大都會》執導廣告，由李多慧代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Wan Zhuan Da Du Hui, featuring endorser Lee Da-hye.
works.concept_zh: 這支把代言人的多重分身，直接翻成城市天際線上的一整排巨幅看板——她扮演的每一個角色，都變成一座城市地標。開場先把她的三個造型（辦公室女強人、啦啦隊、居家捲髮）平放在沙灘上做比較，像在陳列商品；下一秒，其中一個已經放大成大樓看板。看板開始朝現實下起鈔票雨，她乾脆從螢幕裡走出來，站在街頭一張一張數錢。這正好把這款都市模擬遊戲「一個人可以活出好幾種人生」的賣點，演成一場全城矚目的造星奇觀——誇張到自己都在笑自己。代言人的分身數，直接等於遊戲讓你體驗的人生數，賣點藏在畫面裡，不用一句話解釋。
works.concept_en: This one translates the endorser's many personas straight into a full row of giant billboards across the city skyline — every role she plays becomes a city landmark. It opens by laying her three looks (girlboss office worker, cheerleader, curler-haired homebody) out flat on the beach for comparison, like products on display; a beat later, one of them has blown up into a building-sized billboard. The billboard starts raining cash down into the real world, and she just steps out of the screen, standing on the street counting the bills one by one. That's exactly the city-building sim's promise — "one player, many lives" — staged as a citywide spectacle of overnight stardom, so over-the-top it's laughing at itself. The number of her personas equals the number of lives the game lets you live: the pitch is buried in the image, no line of explanation needed.

works.views_note: 本篇單支影片 10.2萬觀看；同系列「震撼登場」全 8 支官方影片合計超過 290 萬觀看
works.views_note_en: This single cut has drawn 102K views; the full "Shocking Debut" series of 8 official videos has drawn a combined 2.9M+ views
works.desc_zh: 為國際大作《失落的方舟》（Amazon Games）執導廣告，官方系列影片合計觀看數超過 290 萬。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the major title Lost Ark (Amazon Games); the official campaign series has drawn a combined 2.9M+ views.
works.concept_zh: 這支沒有一張臉可以靠，全靠氣氛說服你——證明一款遊戲夠暗、夠有戲，可以完全不靠代言人或一句口號。斗篷身影從灰霧裡慢慢浮出來，伸手碰到一圈血色光暈的那一刻，字卡寫著「體內潛藏著無法抑制的力量」——「墮入黑暗」被拍成一個緩慢又確定的動作，不需要台詞收尾。鏡頭最後俯瞰一整片焦土，片名自己浮出來，成了整支片最後、也是唯一的一記鉤子。當畫面本身的完成度夠高，片名不必解釋，光是浮出來就夠重。
works.concept_en: This one has no face to lean on — it convinces you entirely through mood, proving a game can sell its darkness and drama with no spokesperson and no tagline at all. A cloaked figure rises slowly out of gray mist, and the instant a hand touches a ring of blood-red light, the caption reads "an uncontrollable power lurks within" — the fall into darkness is shot as one slow, certain gesture, with no line needed to close it. The camera finally pulls back over a whole field of scorched earth, and the title surfaces on its own, becoming the film's last and only hook. When the craft of the image itself is high enough, the title needs no explanation — just surfacing is weight enough.

_removed_works.title_zh: RO仙境傳說：初心之戰《律師篇》
_removed_works.client: RO 仙境傳說：初心之戰

_removed_works.views_note_en: The original pairing mislabeled the case as "Dawn"; the director's own channel actually lists Ragnarok Online: The First Fight ("Doctor"/"Professor"/"Lawyer" cuts) with no "Dawn" entry. Replaced with the official channel's (GRAVITY COMMUNICATIONS) "Lawyer_15s" cut of the same case, confirmed consistent with the "Lawyer" cut on the director's channel (9uJV8x3Foq4, director: York Cheng)
_removed_works.desc_zh: 為經典大型 IP《仙境傳說：初心之戰》執導廣告（律師篇），官方頻道累積超過 28 萬觀看。

brands_games_en: Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters
